title: Null Comparison
description: Checks that $null is on the left side of any equality comparisons (eq, ne, ceq, cne, ieq, ine). When there is an array on the left side of a null equality comparison, PowerShell will check for a $null IN the array rather than if the array is null. If the two sides of the comparison are switched this is fixed. Therefore, $null should always be on the left side of equality comparisons just in case.
